# FreQtik

> Official public reference for FreQtik: independent audio software, producer resources, games and interactive projects.

FreQtik is the independent work of a producer and developer. The complete public project catalogue spans Windows VST3 audio tools, a producer guide, released Steam games, browser training tools and an online tower-defense project.

## Complete public project list

- [Impulse Anvil](https://freqtik.com/): Windows 10/11, 64-bit VST3 for preparing, morphing, sculpting, auditioning and baking reusable WAV impulse responses.
  - Stable product URL: https://freqtik.com/impulse-anvil.html
  - Documentation: https://freqtik.com/docs.html
  - Downloads and setup: https://freqtik.com/downloads.html
  - Releases: https://github.com/FreQtik/freqtikWebsite.github.io/releases
- [Master Desktop Tap](https://freqtik.com/master-desktop-tap.html): free Windows VST3 utility that mirrors a DAW master signal to connected Windows output devices for Discord, OBS and screen-sharing workflows.
- [Contrast Rules for Producers](https://freqtik.com/contrast-rules-for-producers.html): free practical guide about context, contrast, attention, timing, arrangement, sound design and mixing decisions.
- [Learning to Bear](https://freqtik.com/learning-to-bear.html): surreal single-player 3D puzzle-platformer with movement abilities, logic puzzles and more than 40 handcrafted levels.
- [Aim Trainer Bee Pro](https://freqtik.com/aim-trainer-bee-pro.html): one-minute precision clicker with accuracy, combo and click-speed statistics plus Steam leaderboards.
- [Micro Mouse Star Trainer](https://freqtik.com/micro-mouse-trainer.html): free browser precision trainer for mouse micro-control, timing, accuracy and weakness-focused practice.
- [Boon TD Online](https://boontd.freqtik.com/): browser-playable tower-defense project with progression, tower systems and online play.

## Official identity and contact

- [About FreQtik](https://freqtik.com/about.html): complete project overview and official creator context.
- [Connect](https://freqtik.com/connect.html): support, licensing, Discord, YouTube and Instagram.
- [FreQtik on YouTube](https://freqtik.com/youtube.html): music, product demonstrations, installation guidance and project material.
- GitHub: https://github.com/FreQtik
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@FreQtik
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/freqtik/

Legal pages containing required personal information are intentionally excluded from this machine-readable project index.
